name: @trf/ui2 design system docs
purpose: AI-navigable knowledge layer. Read this manifest first, then load ONLY the doc you need. Do not load everything.

docs.README-START-HERE.md: Entry point: status legend, reading order, task-based map.
docs.03-design-tokens.md: Colors, radius, fonts, dark mode. The token contract. Use tokens, never raw values.
docs.05-iconography.md: Lucide is the single icon library. Sizes and rules.
docs.07-component-architecture.md: Layer model (tokens -> primitives -> app code), where things live, new-component process.
docs.13-ai-coding-guidelines.md: Non-negotiable rules for any AI writing UI in or against this system.
docs.08-ui-components/: One doc per component (props, variants, when to use). Load the specific component file.
docs.for-consuming-apps.md: How one of the 14 TRF apps adopts trf-ui2, plus the AGENTS.md pointer snippet.
